targets.expr: sum by(uri, status) (http_server_requests_seconds_sum{application=~"$service", uri!~".*swagger.*", uri!="/", uri!="/**", uri!="/v3/api-docs/{group}", uri!~".*actuator.*"}) / sum by(uri, status) (http_server_requests_seconds_count{application=~"$service", uri!~".*swagger.*", uri!="/", uri!="/**", uri!="/v3/api-docs/{group}", uri!~".*actuator.*"})
